Metadata.title: HOT22 — Auto AC Varna | Repair & Recharge
Metadata.description: Professional auto air conditioning repair, recharge and diagnostics in Varna. Full range of services for your car's climate system.

Hero.title: Your AC.
Hero.subtitle: Professional auto air conditioning repair and recharge in Varna. Everything A to Z for your car's climate system.

Services.sectionSubtitle: Full spectrum care for your climate system
Services.repairDesc: Diagnostics, refrigerant recharge with R134a and R1234yf, leak repair and full AC system overhaul.
Services.heatingDesc: Heating system cleaning and repair, dashboard removal, valve repair for precise temperature control.
Services.ozoneDesc: Professional ozone cleaning — elimination of odors, bacteria and moisture from the cabin.
Services.flushDesc: Complete AC system flush to remove contaminants, old oil and metal particles.
Services.diagnosticsDesc: Precision diagnostics with leak detector and UV testing for micro-leaks in the refrigerant system.
Services.componentsDesc: Replacement and repair of compressors, condensers, evaporators, radiators and electrical parts.

WhyUs.experienceDesc: Specialized expertise in automotive climate systems for all car brands.
WhyUs.equipmentDesc: Professional equipment for precision diagnostics and repair.
WhyUs.personalDesc: Attention to every detail and individual approach to each client.
WhyUs.allBrandsDesc: We work with all car makes and models.
WhyUs.fullServiceDesc: Everything A to Z for your car's climate system.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Your trusted auto AC partner in Varna
About.story: HOT22 is a specialized auto air conditioning service in Varna. With years of experience and modern equipment, we offer a full range of services — from diagnostics and recharge to complete repair of your car's climate system.
About.mission: Our mission is to ensure comfort and safety for every driver, regardless of car make and model.
